name: Sunflag Iron and Steel Company Limited
summary: Sunflag Iron and Steel Company Limited manufactures and sells steel rolled products in India. The company offers bearing, cold forging, engine valve, micro alloyed, forging, free cutting, stainless, spring, and tool steels, as well as carbon, valve, alloy, free and semi free cutting, cold heading, and high strength steel; and forging ingots, super alloys, magnetic flux leakage testing systems, and automatic phased array ultrasonic machines. It also provides round bars, round cornered squares in straight bars, round and hexagonal wire rods, and hexagonal and flat sections straight bars, as well as bright bars, such as peeled/drawn/ground bars. The company's products are used for the manufacture of automotive transmission gears, drive shafts, steering systems, bearings, exhaust systems, engine components, suspension systems, gear boxes, drive trains, and steering systems. It serves railways, ordnance factories, power sectors, and other general engineering areas. The company exports its products to South East Asia, the Middle East, Europe, and the United States. Sunflag Iron and Steel Company Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Nagpur, India.
